title: Coverage patterns and default camera energy (project house style)
house_style: Prefer slow motivated motion + angled camera; static + pure eye_level only if necessary.

coverage_roles.purpose: Geography and relationship of bodies to space
Body language and blocking between characters
Face and reaction; protect performance with gentle motion
Eyeline and conversational axis; keep 180-degree line; still angled

dialogue_interior: master WS slow pan or lateral, slight high
OTS A micro drift, ots_high or slight_high
OTS B micro drift, ots_low or slight_low
single A MCU slow push on pressure, slight_low
single B reaction micro drift, slight_high
revelation_beat: insert object micro push or rack, slight_high

axis_rules: Maintain 180-degree line for reverse coverage unless intentional break for disorientation
Angled camera does not excuse crossing the line
